messages.content:
Brief: Launch headline for a self-serve API observability tool aimed at backend engineers. Must name the audience, lead with the outcome, and stay under 12 words.
Current headline: Backend engineers: understand your API faster with full-stack observability
Critique: Better — names the audience, but 'understand faster' is vague; state the measurable outcome and trim to under 12 words.

request.system: You are a senior copywriter revising a headline. Apply the editor's critique to the current headline and reply with ONLY the improved headline text — no quotes, no preamble.

response.content: Backend engineers: trace any API failure to its root cause in minutes
